title: erodium celtibericum
intro: Erodium celtibericum, also known as the Iberian storksbill, is a perennial plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Erodium celtibericum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Erodium celtibericum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
